title: Playground Repro Board
concept: A single-column task-board workflow for support engineers reproducing bugs, where Create, Save, Manage, Inspect, Export, and Debug lanes behave like dense IDE tickets and the live WordPress site is a preview card inside the board.
focus: IDE-like file, code, and log affordances
visible consequences for saving, reset, delete, export, and import
flows: Select a launch source from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or zip import with each route showing its real input requirements.
Save a temporary Playground either in browser storage or to a local directory, see file-copy progress, and observe the resulting saved shell state.
Manage temporary and browser-backed Playgrounds from a saved list with rename, staged delete, and visible browser storage consequences.
Use Site Manager tickets for runtime settings, destructive reset or saved reload, file browsing, Blueprint editing, database tools, and logs.
Browse featured and catalog Blueprint entries with category filters, search, selected detail, inspect JSON, and run behavior.
Export to GitHub, download a zip, or import a zip over the current site while overwrite and authentication consequences remain visible.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
